bad_json.description: Model output is not parseable JSON.
bad_json.suggested_fix: Run formatter repair and strengthen JSON schema prompts.

missing_final.description: No usable final answer is returned.
missing_final.suggested_fix: Backfill from extracted candidate and enforce final-answer guardrails.

dirty_boxed.description: Boxed field contains long markdown or non-answer text.
dirty_boxed.suggested_fix: Sanitize boxed field and keep only concise answer atoms.

boxed_42_fallback.description: Fallback answer 42 appeared in boxed or value field.
boxed_42_fallback.suggested_fix: Inspect route/tool traces and remove unconditional fallback logic.

proof_partial.description: Proof-style task produced only partial conclusion.
proof_partial.suggested_fix: Invoke proof guardian constraints and tighten proof completion checks.

verifier_failed.suggested_fix: Capture failure reason and add a regression case for replay.

tool_failed.suggested_fix: Record tool trace summary and add targeted fallback path.

timeout_or_exception.description: Solve pass timed out or raised an exception.
timeout_or_exception.suggested_fix: Use bounded retries and isolate failing stage.

zero_model_calls.description: No model call happened for a solve run.
zero_model_calls.suggested_fix: Audit route entry and ensure solver invocation preconditions.

trace_missing.suggested_fix: Confirm explicit trace settings and avoid relying on implicit writes.

low_confidence.description: Result confidence is below acceptable threshold.
low_confidence.suggested_fix: Trigger verifier or refinement when confidence gate fails.

route_error.suggested_fix: Track route stats and improve route prompt constraints.

schema_repaired.description: Output required schema repair before use.
schema_repaired.suggested_fix: Strengthen schema-aware prompting and monitor repair frequency.
